requestedBehavior.lightTheme: white text with the existing daytime Golden Gate cockpit image
requestedBehavior.nightTheme: black text with a distinct nighttime Golden Gate cockpit image
requestedBehavior.mobile: Sift and Anduril employer marks and experience cards remain visible

nightAsset.lineage: Existing built-in ImageGen lighting-weather edit of the same A7R05501 Golden Gate cockpit composition; reused instead of generating another image.

checks.themeTokens: pass: final cascade sets day text to #ffffff and night text to #050505
checks.themeSourceSwitch: pass: hero source map selects the day 1280 image and night 1672 image with correct width descriptors
checks.mobileLogos: pass: <=639px hides the general logo set and explicitly shows Sift and Anduril by canonical href
checks.mobileCards: pass: <=639px explicitly keeps #work-sift and #work-anduril displayed and visible
checks.releaseArtifacts: pass: preview, full-page, source, and publish code block contain one v048 override and both theme source references
checks.browserQA: blocked: no in-app or extension browser was available during candidate validation

truthBoundary.verified: source, asset, theme cascade, theme image selection contract, and mobile visibility selectors
truthBoundary.notVerified: rendered mobile pixels or public custom-domain behavior before deployment
